// BAD: public glob re-exports flatten the crate surface
pub use crate::handlers::*;
pub use crate::models::*;
pub use crate::utils::*;
pub use crate::config::*;

mod handlers {
    pub fn handle_request() {}
    pub fn handle_response() {}
}

mod models {
    pub struct User {}
    pub struct Order {}
}

mod utils {
    pub fn format_date() {}
    pub fn parse_json() {}
}

mod config {
    pub struct Config {}
    pub fn load() {}
}
